plugins.name: tw-dev
plugins.description: Dev-phase SDLC skills for any kind of development: orchestrate, requirements, design, coding (web, API, CLI, library, mobile, data/ML — single or multi-component with interface contracts), QA strategy (E2E/acceptance/performance), and compliance — stack and project-type agnostic

plugins.name: tw-atlassian
plugins.description: Atlassian MCP integration — connects Jira and Confluence to the tw-dev orchestrator via OAuth browser login. Install separately; no authentication is forced on tw-dev users.
